html:
Exclusive to:

“Creates a flash in the sky that can be seen by all survivors on the minimap.”

-

The Flare is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Tools Filter, requires Cut Grass, Twigs and Nitre to craft, and does not need to be prototyped.

When placed on the ground and lit with a Torch or a Lighter, the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It will then cause all other players to make an announcement about the flare and create a marking on the Map that is near, but not on, the launch site, for 15 seconds that is visible to all players.

Rift Content

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Player can activate a Flare to shoot down and stun one nearby Crystal-Crested Buzzard.

Trivia

  • The Flare was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Assets

  • Fire
  • Place

Gallery

  • A placed Flare.
  • The mark caused by a lit Flare on the Map.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"miniflare"
“I can light it to let everyone know I'm here.”
–Wilson
“I can't WAIT to light it!”
–Willow
“Is tiny sky boom!”
–Wolfgang
“Why? No one will come.”
–Wendy
“MAKESHIFT HOMING SIGNAL”
–WX-78
“It's safer for everyone to stick together.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just needs a light.”
–Woodie
“For those with a flare for the dramatic.”
–Maxwell
“Never split thy party!”
–Wigfrid
“Just in case someone's lost and lonely.”
–Webber
“I can signal mes amis!”
–Warly
“Makes pretty lights”
–Wormwood
“Safety in numbers, hey?”
–Winona
“Mortals get lost sometimes, hyuyu.”
–Wortox
“Sparky!”
–Wurt
“It's a signal, only to be used in an emergency.”
–Walter
“It'll show everyone where I am, when I am is another story.”
–Wanda
“Creates a flash in the sky that can be seen by all survivors on the minimap.”

When placed on the ground and lit with a Torch or a Lighter, the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It will then cause all other players to make an announcement about the flare and create a marking on the Map that is near, but not on, the launch site, for 15 seconds that is visible to all players.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngọn Lửa là một Vật Phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Công cụ, yêu cầu Cắt Cỏ, Cành cây và Nitre để chế tạo và không cần phải tạo nguyên mẫu.

{{Scrapbook Info|Creates a flash in the sky that can be seen by all survivors on the minimap.}}
The '''Flare''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is found in the [[Tools Filter]], requires [[Cut Grass]], [[Twigs]] and [[Nitre]] to craft, and does not need to be prototyped.

When placed on the ground and lit with a [[Torch]] or a [[Willow's Lighter|Lighter]], the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It will then cause all other players to make an announcement about the flare and create a marking on the [[Map]] that is near, but not on, the launch site, for 15 seconds that is visible to all players.
__NOTOC__
==Rift Content==
{{Rift Content|Lunar}}
Player can activate a '''Flare''' to shoot down and stun one nearby [[Crystal-Crested Buzzard]].

=={{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe|item1=Flare|count1=3|item2=Glommer's Goop|count2=1|result=Hostile Flare}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
*The Flare was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
